engineering.translation: On the path just opened — buddhi-yoga, action issuing from a settled intelligence — only one decision exists, and it has shape. A staff engineer who has actually reached the migration plan grounded in customer-need and system-truth carries one load-bearing roadmap. Whoever skipped that grounding proliferates instead. Proposals fork into Postgres-vs-DynamoDB, gRPC-vs-REST, monorepo-vs-polyrepo, Kafka-vs-Kinesis, and each new fork is treated as fresh optionality rather than as deferred commitment. The verse names the proliferation as a condition of the intellect, not as a tactic. Branching past the point where evidence should collapse the branches is diagnostic of irresolution; resolute practitioners branch once and stop. Note carefully: resolution is not the impulse-decision a tired operator makes to escape discomfort. It is conviction following groundwork — what is actually broken, what the user actually needs, what production actually does — and is therefore singular because the substrate is singular.
engineering.concrete_scenario: It is staff review at a payments firm. Two engineers present roadmap proposals for the same problem: the legacy reconciliation pipeline drops transactions on quarter-end. The first presents one design — a partitioned event-sourced ledger on Postgres logical replication, with a documented cutover sequence, named owners, and a rollback path already tested in staging. There is no second slide because no second proposal exists. When the senior architect probes, the answer matches what was on the slide. The second engineer presents seven options. A: rebuild on Kafka. B: DynamoDB streams. C: introduce Kinesis. D: a Snowflake-backed CDC pipeline. E through G are variants. Each option carries a comparison table; none carries an owner, an integration-test plan, or a defined cutover. When probed, the presenter says they are still 'gathering input' and want to 'preserve optionality.' Both presenters are technically competent; the difference is not skill. The first carries one settled intellect, anchored in actual customer-impact data. The second carries a many-branched mind whose proliferation is itself the symptom that the prior grounding work was skipped. The verse names the second state as a condition of the intellect, not as a strategy.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader uses it to justify cargo-cult conviction — picking the first technology that comes to mind and refusing alternatives in the name of being 'resolute.' Resolution is decision-after-discrimination, not decision-against-discrimination. Whoever shipped a Postgres-on-EBS migration without ever testing the consistency model has not produced a settled intellect; they produced an unexamined one. The check is whether the choice survives an honest probe of 'what data did you ground this in?' — not whether the presenter can recite their plan confidently.
engineering.counter_example: When work is genuinely in the discovery phase — customer-impact data has not returned, the failure is not yet reproducible, behaviour under the candidate fix has not been measured — multi-branched investigation is exactly correct. The verse does not bless premature commitment as a substitute for groundwork. The diagnostic is not 'how many branches survive' but 'have you done the work that should reduce them?' If branches persist past the point where evidence would have collapsed them, that is irresolution. If branches are appropriate to a genuinely undetermined substrate, this teaching does not apply yet.
engineering.implication: Audit your last three architectural proposals. Count the branches that survived past the point at which customer data, production probes, or behavioural tests should have eliminated them. Those surviving forks are the diagnostic — not of richer thinking, but of thinner grounding. The fix is not faster commitment; it is the prior work that turns the question into a single settled one.
engineering.quotable_line: Branching past where evidence should collapse it is the diagnostic of irresolution — not of richer thinking, but of thinner grounding.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 2.41 establishes vyavasāyātmikā buddhi as the doorway into buddhi-yoga. Engineering layer anchors on Shankara's reading (resolute conviction grounded in right pramāṇa) plus Ramanuja's reading (unshakable conviction arising from prior determination of the substrate). Concrete scenario uses two-engineer architectural-review framing: first engineer with one decided plan (Postgres logical replication, named owners, rollback tested) vs second engineer with seven 'optionality-preserving' branches. Named tools: Postgres, DynamoDB, gRPC, REST, Kafka, Kinesis, Snowflake. Falsifiability handles the cargo-cult-conviction failure mode (vyavasāya is decision-after-discrimination, not decision-against-discrimination). Counter-example carves out the genuine discovery phase. Tags: roadmap-conviction, deliberate-action, judgment-under-uncertainty.

v2 editorial pass: replaced technical Sanskrit terms in engineering register with English equivalents (vyavasāyātmikā buddhi → 'one settled intellect'; bahu-śākhā buddhi → 'many-branched mind'; vyavasāya → resolution; avyavasāya → irresolution). Split compound sentences. Added prose connectives. Doctrinal claim — that proliferation past evidence-collapse is diagnostic of skipped groundwork, not of richer thinking — is preserved verbatim.
